name.description: Identifier used to refer to the replacement model from model overrides.

description.description: Optional description of what this model applies to or is used for.

modelIds.description: Vanilla model IDs to load and merge together.

contrast.description: Lighting contrast passed to ModelData.light. Defaults to 0.

ambient.description: Lighting ambient passed to ModelData.light. Defaults to 0.

offsetX.description: Local X offset applied before object orientation. Defaults to 0.

offsetY.description: Local Y offset applied before object orientation. Defaults to 0.

offsetZ.description: Local Z offset applied before object orientation. Defaults to 0.

modelSizeX.description: Scale factor for the X axis. 128 is unscaled. Defaults to 128.

modelSizeY.description: Scale factor for the Y axis. 128 is unscaled. Defaults to 128.

modelHeight.description: Scale factor for the height axis. 128 is unscaled. Defaults to 128.

rotated.description: Whether source models should be rotated 90 degrees before merging. Defaults to false.

recolorTo.description: HSL colors to recolor to. Must match recolorFrom length.

retextureTo.description: Texture IDs to retexture to. Must match retextureFrom length.

models.description: Named sub-models merged together. Each entry inherits unset fields from the parent definition.
